recommendations.title: The Colony
recommendations.overview: Forced underground by the next ice age, a struggling outpost of survivors must fight to preserve humanity against a threat even more savage than nature.

recommendations.title: Breathe
recommendations.overview: Air-supply is scarce in the near future, forcing a mother and daughter to fight for survival when two strangers arrive desperate for an oxygenated haven.

recommendations.title: Terminus
recommendations.overview: Following a near-fatal accident, David Chamberlain makes an unprecedented discovery that will not only determine the fate of his family, but of mankind.

recommendations.title: Zone 414
recommendations.overview: In the near future on a colony of state-of-the-art robots, a private investigator is hired by the colony's creator to bring his missing daughter home.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: Three generations of the same family deal with the consequences of unleashing the forces of hell.

recommendations.title: Mystery Team
recommendations.overview: A group of former Encyclopedia Brown-style child-detectives struggle to solve an adult mystery.

recommendations.title: 40 Acres
recommendations.overview: Hailey Freeman and her family are the last descendants of African American farmers who settled in rural Canada after the Civil War. In a famine-decimated near future, they now struggle to safeguard their farm, as they make one last stand against a vi

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.

recommendations.title: The Last Survivors
recommendations.overview: In the near future, society collapses and water becomes scarce. When a greedy water baron starts violently clearing out survivors, Kendal, a 17-year-old teenager, fights the baron's henchman to keep a well open.

recommendations.title: Battlefield Earth
recommendations.overview: In the year 3000, man is no match for the Psychlos, a greedy, manipulative race of aliens on a quest for ultimate profit. Led by the powerful Terl, the Psychlos are stripping Earth clean of its natural resources, using the broken remnants of humanity
